games/hllib patch to apply update

games/hllib version update (2.4.4 -> 2.4.6) and maintainer change.

Changes:

- Patch to fix SGAFile (Many compilation issues on the latest upstream release).
- Update from 2.4.4 to 2.4.6.
- Maintainer change.
- Pristine distfiles now hosted on GitHub (original site is now down).
